This page was generated using data obtained on various dates including -data-was-not-downloaded-for-now-, 2023-09-29. Please, send me a message if you want it updated!




Proposed edits at this page are so obvious that automatic edit makes sense.

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect
wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q612214 vs (missing) article redirects from de:Feldberg (Mecklenburg) to de:Feldberg (Feldberger Seenlandschaft)
Feldberg - an affected OSM element that may be improved
de:Feldberg (Mecklenburg) -> de:Feldberg (Feldberger Seenlandschaft)
Feldberg (Feldberger Seenlandschaft)

Q17937 vs (missing) article redirects from nl:Station Groningen (hoofdstation) to nl:Station Groningen
Groningen - an affected OSM element that may be improved
nl:Station Groningen (hoofdstation) -> nl:Station Groningen
Station Groningen

Q7979138 vs (missing) article redirects from de:Bahnhof Wedel to de:Bahnhof Wedel (Holst)

de:Bahnhof Wedel -> de:Bahnhof Wedel (Holst)

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for operator prefixed tags
operator:wikidata and operator:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because operator:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed
